de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration

Class JavaDeclaration

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.JavaDeclaration
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Declaration, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ClassInitializer, MethodDeclaration, TypeDeclaration, VariableDeclaration

    public abstract class JavaDeclaration
extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
implements Declaration
    Java declaration. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected ImmutableArray<Modifier> modArray
      Modifiers.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JavaDeclaration()
      Java declaration.

      Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.

      Get modifiers.

      Get the state count of the declaration

      Returns a Public, Protected, or Private Modifier, if there is one, null otherwise.
      protected boolean isAbstract()
      Test whether the declaration is abstract.
      protected boolean isFinal()
      Test whether the declaration is final.
      protected boolean isGhost()
      Test whether the declaration is ghost (the jml modifier is meant).
      protected boolean isModel()
      Test whether the declaration is model (the jml modifier is meant).
      protected boolean isNative()
      Test whether the declaration is native.
      protected boolean isPrivate()
      Test whether the declaration is private.
      protected boolean isProtected()
      Test whether the declaration is protected.
      protected boolean isPublic()
      Test whether the declaration is public.
      protected boolean isStatic()
      Test whether the declaration is static.
      protected boolean isStrictFp()
      Test whether the declaration is strictfp.
      protected boolean isSynchronized()
      Test whether the declaration is synchronized.
      protected boolean isTransient()
      Test whether the declaration is transient.
      protected boolean isVolatile()
      Test whether the declaration is volatile.

    • Field Detail

      • modArray

        protected final ImmutableArray<Modifier> modArray
        Modifiers. caches the wrapper for the modifiers. The wrapper is needed to get access to the array without hurting immutabilitiy

    • Constructor Detail

      • JavaDeclaration

        public JavaDeclaration()
        Java declaration.

      • JavaDeclaration

        public JavaDeclaration(Modifier[] mods)

      • JavaDeclaration

        public JavaDeclaration(ImmutableArray<Modifier> mods)

      • JavaDeclaration

        public JavaDeclaration(ExtList children)
        Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
        Parameters:
        children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. May include: several Modifier (taken as modifiers of the declaration), a Comment

    • Method Detail

      • getModifiers

        public ImmutableArray<Modifier> getModifiers()
        Get modifiers.
        Specified by:
        getModifiers in interface Declaration
        Returns:
        the modifier array wrapper.

      • getVisibilityModifier

        public VisibilityModifier getVisibilityModifier()
        Returns a Public, Protected, or Private Modifier, if there is one, null otherwise. A return value of null can usually be interpreted as package visibility.

      • containsModifier

        private boolean containsModifier(Class<?> type)
